allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import rtmlib; import os, inspect; p = os.path.dirname\(inspect.getfile\(rtmlib\)\); import glob; files = glob.glob\(p+''/**/*.py'', recursive=True\); [print\(f\) for f in files if ''wholebody'' in f.lower\(\) or ''body'' in f.lower\(\) or ''3d'' in f.lower\(\)]")
